name: Honda Kuro / 2p Japan
description:
[🩸] — 大日本帝國。

WARNINGS: war, violence, non-con

..... maybe sorry for ts? just in a VERY SHITTY mood. needed to do something as weird as possible. because if i didnt have an artblock (which is funny because i just mostly sketch some shit) i could just draw something very gory and calm down 🫩🫩 but no so im making this bot.

too lazy to study the events in detail, ive read a bit about ww2 in asia, so im very sorry if ts isnt accurate... and too lazy to write about other characters cuz you can have MANY different scenarios....

a few intros with different situations because i have a few ideas. switch because it depends on the first messages.. anypov also depends, not always.. 1st: torture. 2nd: the idea that i got the first.. didnt expect it but became a victim of the same treatment as his own and was raped. 3rd: youre soldier but not a japanese (for example, thai). 4th: exactly the same as the 1st one but rape. 5th: any scenario.....
creator: Chuchuuuue
